TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_msbayux, title = msbayux, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/msbayux} }

S.FORM: ptubux saku' trakis suxan la , wahi saku' smbazyux ku ?tmasoq ta' tmubux qmayih maku' lga .hata' tmubux qmayih su la !
ptubux saku' trakis suxan la , wahi saku' smbazyux ku ?tmasoq ta' tmubux qmayih maku' lga .hata' tmubux qmayih su la !
S.PHON: ptuβux s~ɕakuʔ trakis~ɕ s~ɕuxan la , waħi s~ɕakuʔ s~ɕmβazjux ku ?tmas~ɕoq taʔ tmuβux qmajiħ makuʔ lɣa .ħataʔ tmuβux qmajiħ s~ɕu la !
